top_picks.thesis: ALGN is one of the highest-quality setups in our universe right now with a score of 100. It's in a confirmed Stage 2 uptrend and has formed a VCP with 5 contractions (tightest: 3.3%) — the textbook pre-breakout coiling that Minervini built his career on. Trade setup: entry at $177.35, stop at $163.16 (–8%), target $212.81 (+20%). Risk/reward: 2.5:1.
key_strengths: confirmed Stage 2 uptrend (price $177.35 above MA50 $174 and MA200 $160)
VCP pattern with 5 contractions, tightest pullback 3.3% — classic coiled-spring setup
extremely tight base (sub-5% contraction) — high-velocity breakout potential
RS line rising 8.4% in last 4 weeks — outperforming the market
what_to_watch: RSI at 52 — momentum healthy, watch for RSI to stay above 50 on any pullback
price is 14.4% from 52-week high — needs to reclaim that level to confirm breakout

top_picks.name: AFLAC Incorporated
top_picks.thesis: AFL is one of the highest-quality setups in our universe right now with a score of 100. It's in a confirmed Stage 2 uptrend and has formed a VCP with 4 contractions (tightest: 2.5%) — the textbook pre-breakout coiling that Minervini built his career on. Fundamentals back it up: EPS +3860% and revenue +28% YoY — the kind of numbers that attract institutional money. Key risk to monitor: RS line -9% off its high — underperforming the market somewhat. Trade setup: entry at $116.93, stop at $107.58 (–8%), target $140.32 (+20%). Risk/reward: 2.5:1.
key_strengths: confirmed Stage 2 uptrend (price $116.93 above MA50 $115 and MA200 $110)
VCP pattern with 4 contractions, tightest pullback 2.5% — classic coiled-spring setup
extremely tight base (sub-5% contraction) — high-velocity breakout potential
EPS growing 3860% year-over-year — institutional-grade earnings momentum
key_risks: RS line -9% off its high — underperforming the market somewhat
what_to_watch: RSI at 64 — momentum healthy, watch for RSI to stay above 50 on any pullback
price is just 1.1% from 52-week high at $118.24 — that level is key resistance/breakout point
